_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Perform risk assessment on AI applications to identify technical, societal, organizational, and mission risks.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in communicating AI risk findings to technical and non-technical audiences, translating statistical risk measures into business impact terms.
comments: DCWF task equal WIDAI RM domain. RM-S-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-T-012 (RC, cosine: 0.694), AG-S-005 (AG, cosine: 0.687).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.2/10 (raw 0.620). Shared vocabulary: [ai, risk, technical]. DCWF-only terms [applications, assessment, identify, mission, organizational, perform] vs WIDAI-only terms [audiences, business, communicating, findings, impact, measures] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.889 (P=0.895, R=0.882). Balanced P/R — the 14-word DCWF element and 19-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Perform risk assessment on AI applications to identify technical, societal, orga" and "Skill in communicating AI risk findings to technical and non-technical audiences" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.727 > STS 0.620 (gap +0.107). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [ai, risk, technical] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 18.5%. Shared tokens: [ai, risk, technical]. DCWF-only: [applications, assessment, identify, mission, organizational, perform]. WIDAI-only: [audiences, business, communicating, findings, impact, measures].
